# BED Downsampling Report

**Generated:** 2026-02-25 18:33 UTC

| | Value |
|---|---|
| **Input** | `giab_highconf_wgs_calling_regions_hg38_intersection` — 1,047,093 intervals, 2.39 Gbp |
| **Target** | 248.9 Mbp (--match-file GRCh38_lowmappabilityall.bed (248.9 Mbp)) |
| **Output** | `giab_highconf_wgs_calling_regions_hg38_intersection.downsampled.bed` — 110,084 intervals, 248.8 Mbp |
| **Reduction** | 89.6% of original bp |

## Before / After

| Metric | Before | After |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Intervals | 1,047,093 | 110,084 |
| Total bp | 2.39 Gbp | 248.8 Mbp |
| Mean width | 2,278 | 2,260 |
| Median width | 1,234 | 1,226 |
| % GRCh38 | 77.26% | 8.06% |
